Add approved transparent image assets here. The app automatically falls back to its built-in illustration or letter mark when a file is missing.

Vehicle renders (transparent PNG or WebP, 3/4 front view recommended):
- vehicles/bmw-x3.webp
- vehicles/audi-q5.webp
- vehicles/ford-mach-e.webp

Official brand logos (SVG recommended):
- logos/enterprise.svg
- logos/national.svg
- logos/alamo.svg

Use official press/media kits or internally approved Enterprise Holdings assets. Avoid hotlinking remote images because URLs and usage permissions can change.
